original_image_tags: A scanned document, a typed letter on white paper with several handwritten annotations and a red stamped date. The letter is addressed to the FBI and asks questions about the withholding of information regarding unidentified flying objects and captured extraterrestrial craft.

elements.description: Typed letter on off-white paper addressed to F.B.I. from RG Mastroberte, Director: FSRO. The letter asks questions about unidentified flying objects and mysterious disappearances. Includes a blue ink signature, a red 'L' mark, a stamped date '8 JUL 2 1963', a stamped number 'REG-36 62-83894-428', and a red 'CORRESPONDENCE' stamp. There are handwritten annotations at the bottom left ('acd 6/27/63' and initials) and a punched hole at the top center.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text (stamp '8 JUL 2 1963', number 'REG-36 62-83894-428', handwritten 'acd 6/27/63') not mentioned by Description A, and Description A claims a 'red stamped date' while Description B specifies the exact date, creating a contradiction in the specificity of quoted text.
